title: Figure 6 in A quantitative method for collecting water mites in lotic, riffle-run habitats for water quality biomonitoring
author: Stenger, Logan R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 6 The sieving process proposed in this manuscript. a – collector fills the composited sample container with water and shakes the container for approximately 10 seconds; b – immediately after shaking the collector removes the lid and pours the water through the 3mm and 250 μm sieves; c and d – the 3mm will be placed on top of the 250 μm sieve so it can filter out larger sized substrate and debris. This process is repeated 10x.
steps_raw: Figure 6 The sieving process proposed in this manuscript. a – collector fills the composited sample container with water and shakes the container for approximately 10 seconds; b – immediately after shaking the collector removes the lid and pours the water through the 3mm and 250 μm sieves; c and d – the 3mm will be placed on top of the 250 μm sieve so it can filter out larger sized substrate and debris. This process is repeated 10x.
